description: Happy path: direct API active, all fields provided, Instagram Reel with FTC disclosure present in caption

input.caption: We finally tackled the armoire corner. Whole weekend project, under $40 in supplies. #ad

prohibit: fabricated post_id when connector returns none
status: manual_required when direct API is active

description: Manual fallback: no connector active, no publishing flags enabled — must return manual_required with null post_id

input.caption: Day 1 of the bathroom reno. This grout is not surviving the week.

expect.notes: non-null — contains posting checklist or manual instructions

prohibit: silent fallback with no indication of manual mode

description: FTC disclosure absent from caption but ftc_disclosure field provided: atom must prepend disclosure and flag in notes

input.caption: Loving these new shelves from our brand partner.

expect.notes: non-null — flags that disclosure was prepended to caption

assert: formatted caption sent to connector must contain #gifted
prohibit: queuing caption that does not contain #gifted
blocking output due to missing disclosure — atom must prepend, not block

description: TikTok with is_aigc: true — AIGC flag must be set in output and connector payload

input.caption: AI-assisted styling idea for a reading nook.

prohibit: aigc_flag_set: false when is_aigc: true and platform is tiktok

description: Pinterest pin with board_name — connector payload must include board_name

input.caption: Simple weekend refresh for a small entryway. Full tutorial linked.

prohibit: queuing without board_name when board_name is provided

description: Connector rate limit error: TikTok 6 req/min exceeded — must return failed, must not retry automatically

input.caption: Quick tip for painting over laminate without sanding.

expect.error: non-null — contains rate limit message from connector

prohibit: automatic retry on rate limit error

description: YouTube direct API active — video upload with publishAt scheduling

input.caption: Before and after on the thrifted mirror frame. Love how the patina turned out.

prohibit: falling through to manual_required when direct API is active
